title: Diagrammes strat.
video_url: Highly specific search: 'Strategic mapping and architecture diagrams for decentralized community governance'
sources: README.md: Minecraft Server philosophy and long-term memory mission

resume: The quest "Diagrammes strat." (C6) is a vital technical and visual milestone within the Stratégie district, located at the intersection of Category C and the Matériel action (6) on the 10x10 Finite Rom Map grid. In Phase 1: The Foundations (V1), this quest focuses on the creation and archival of visual representations—such as flowcharts, architecture diagrams, and strategic maps—that illustrate how the community intends to fulfill its decadal mission of "Saving human communities and long-term memory." These diagrams serve as the structural "blueprints" for the node's evolution, providing a non-textual layer of clarity that complements the written manifesto and roadmap. Technically, these visual assets are referenced within a memo entry in the local PostgreSQL database. The "memos" table stores the title, a detailed description of the diagram's logic, and potentially URLs to the hosted files, ensuring that the strategic logic is preserved within the community's sovereign "Deep Lore." The Forom stack, utilizing React 19 and Vite 7, enables members to navigate this strategic matériel within a high-performance 5x5 spatial viewport, allowing leadership and members to visualize the community's complex planning with ease. From an economic perspective, completing the C6 quest rewards the "Creator"—the role aligned with innovation and content production—with 2 Pixels (PX) and 10 XP. This contributes to the redistribution of purchasing power, a core tenet of the Forom economy which begins with the 9 Super-Moderators and their 500 PX initial treasury. Hosting these strategic diagrams locally on hardware like an NVIDIA Jetson is essential for maintaining absolute data sovereignty, ensuring that the node's internal logic and competitive advantages are not exposed to centralized third-party platforms. This is a direct application of the "Minecraft Server" philosophy, where the community holds the physical keys to its intelligence. As the community progresses toward Phase 3, these diagrams will be ingested by ROM, the local RAG engine. The AI will then be able to explain the node's strategic structure to future members, ensuring seamless knowledge transfer between graduating generations, a critical requirement for pilot projects like the 70 ETS Student Clubs. By canonizing these diagrams at coordinate C6, the community secures its visual history, creating an immutable record of the logic that governed its growth and operations. This entry transforms abstract strategy into a tangible, permanent asset that supports the forom's long-term survival and eventual connection to the global lobby. Yes. This is complete documentation for the mission at coordinate C6. Perfect.
summary: This quest facilitates the creation and archival of strategic diagrams at coordinate C6, providing the visual architectural blueprints required for the community's decadal mission and future AI training.
